category_sources: source_facts.description says find files with SQL-like queries; official GitHub README repeats that description and lists query features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fselect; official GitHub repository and official site title use fselect.
docs_sources: Official fselect.rocks site is the project documentation surface; official GitHub README includes installation and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jhspetersson/fselect, so repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says SQL-like file queries; official GitHub README describes SQL-like grammar, subqueries, archives, metadata, and output formats.
